pi_items.source: ManageEngine ADAudit Plus official documentation indicates that the actual UI labels for these settings are typically 'Removable Device Plug-in' and 'Files Copied to Removable Storage' under the Removable Storage Audit configuration, not the exact strings provided in the metadata.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires the agent to navigate to ADAudit Plus configuration and enable removable storage auditing. The agent must save a screenshot of the configured settings to 'C:\workspace\usb_audit_config_result.png' and create a summary text file at 'C:\workspace\usb_audit_config_summary.txt' containing 'USB Audit Enabled'. The UI terms for the required events are conceptually listed in the metadata but actually correspond to 'Removable Device Plug-in' and 'Files Copied to Removable Storage' (or similar 'File Read/Write/Delete' settings) within the ADAudit Plus interface.
